theme.ja: コーヒーを持って散歩している人
theme.basePromptEn: A single person walking outside while holding a takeaway coffee cup, full body visible, clear walking pose, one hand holding a lidded paper coffee cup, simple outdoor street setting, relaxed morning mood, casual outfit, no extra main characters
mustContain: takeaway coffee cup held in one hand

styles.labelJa: ナイーブ／ワブリー手描き（線）
styles.referenceGlob: ナイーブ／ワブリー手描き[0-9.]*

visualFingerprint.line: uneven hand-drawn outlines, visible wobble, casual sketch pressure
visualFingerprint.shape: playful asymmetry, simplified anatomy, intentionally imperfect proportions
visualFingerprint.color: light backgrounds with a few cheerful accent colors
visualFingerprint.texture: handmade wobbly line drawing, flat color, no polished vector finish
visualFingerprint.composition: loose spacing, small narrative objects, charming irregular balance
visualFingerprint.person: rough human figure, simplified face, expressive posture over correct anatomy

promptFragments: flat colors on an off-white background

improvementRules.tooClean: Add: rough uneven contour lines, imperfect sketch marks, intentionally asymmetric face and hands.
improvementRules.tooRealistic: Add: flat naive drawing, no realistic anatomy, no camera lens effects.
improvementRules.tooCorporate: Remove: corporate vector, geometric precision. Add: handmade editorial zine illustration.
improvementRules.tooBusy: Reduce background detail; keep one person, one cup, a few walking cues.

styles.labelJa: ナイーブ／ワブリー手描き（カラー）
styles.referenceGlob: ナイーブ／ワブリー手描きカラー*

visualFingerprint.line: uneven hand-drawn outlines, visible wobble, casual sketch pressure
visualFingerprint.shape: playful asymmetry, simplified anatomy, intentionally imperfect proportions
visualFingerprint.color: cheerful hand-colored accents with naive uneven balance
visualFingerprint.texture: handmade editorial drawing, not polished vector, mostly flat color
visualFingerprint.composition: loose spacing, small narrative objects, charming irregular balance; 線のワブリーさは残しつつ、主役は軽い差し色・手塗り感。面で覆い切らず、余白と線が見える。
visualFingerprint.person: rough human figure, simplified face, expressive posture over correct anatomy

promptFragments: hand-colored accents remain secondary to wobbly linework
visible off-white gaps between loose color areas
flat colors on an off-white background

improvementRules.tooClean: Add: rough uneven contour lines, imperfect sketch marks, intentionally asymmetric face and hands.
improvementRules.tooRealistic: Add: flat naive drawing, no realistic anatomy, no camera lens effects.
improvementRules.tooCorporate: Remove: corporate vector, geometric precision. Add: handmade editorial zine illustration.
improvementRules.tooBusy: Reduce background detail; keep one person, one cup, a few walking cues.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 線のワブリーさは残しつつ、主役は軽い差し色・手塗り感。面で覆い切らず、余白と線が見える。

styles.labelJa: ナイーブ／ワブリー手描き（塗りつぶし）
styles.referenceGlob: ナイーブ／ワブリー手描き塗りつぶし*

visualFingerprint.line: uneven hand-drawn outlines, visible wobble, casual sketch pressure
visualFingerprint.shape: simple filled naive shapes with intentionally imperfect proportions
visualFingerprint.color: light backgrounds with a few cheerful accent colors
visualFingerprint.texture: handmade editorial drawing, not polished vector, mostly flat color
visualFingerprint.composition: loose spacing, small narrative objects, charming irregular balance; ワブリーな線よりも、素朴な塗りつぶし面が主役。人物や小物が単純な色面として読める。
visualFingerprint.person: rough human figure, simplified face, expressive posture over correct anatomy

promptFragments: filled naive color blocks dominate the figure
bold flat fills inside imperfect outlines
flat colors on an off-white background

improvementRules.tooClean: Add: rough uneven contour lines, imperfect sketch marks, intentionally asymmetric face and hands.
improvementRules.tooRealistic: Add: flat naive drawing, no realistic anatomy, no camera lens effects.
improvementRules.tooCorporate: Remove: corporate vector, geometric precision. Add: handmade editorial zine illustration.
improvementRules.tooBusy: Reduce background detail; keep one person, one cup, a few walking cues.

styles.styleDifferentiator: ワブリーな線よりも、素朴な塗りつぶし面が主役。人物や小物が単純な色面として読める。

styles.labelJa: グレイン入りフラット

visualFingerprint.line: clean simple contours with restrained linework
visualFingerprint.shape: flat simplified shapes, readable silhouettes, low to medium detail
visualFingerprint.color: muted palette with soft contrast, occasional strong blue or warm accent
visualFingerprint.texture: visible paper grain, subtle noisy vector texture, matte surface
visualFingerprint.composition: clear focal object, generous negative space, calm editorial layout
visualFingerprint.person: simplified character, minimal facial detail, accessible SaaS/editorial tone

promptFragments: visible paper grain and subtle noise overlay across every shape

improvementRules.grainWeak: Add: visible paper grain across flat color areas, subtle print noise, matte finish.
improvementRules.tooDetailed: Add: simplified silhouettes, fewer folds, fewer background elements.
improvementRules.tooFlatNoTexture: Increase texture words; add grain to both figure and background.
improvementRules.tooDark: Use light off-white or pale tinted background and restrained contrast.

styles.labelJa: 印刷・版画（リソ／リノカット／木版）
styles.referenceGlob: 印刷・版画（リソ／リノカット／木版）[0-9.]*

visualFingerprint.line: bold carved marks, ink-like edges, rough printed contours
visualFingerprint.shape: poster-like flat blocks, cutout silhouettes, simplified high-contrast forms
visualFingerprint.color: limited spot-color palette, black plus red/pink/yellow/teal, off-white paper
visualFingerprint.texture: risograph grain, linocut or woodblock texture, ink misregistration; 標準のリソ/リノカット。少色・版ズレ・インク粒子のバランス型。木版ほど黒い彫り跡に寄せない。
visualFingerprint.composition: strong graphic layout, print poster energy, deliberate color separation
visualFingerprint.person: reduced to bold readable shapes, expressive silhouette rather than detailed face

promptFragments: spot colors with slight registration offset
print texture without heavy woodcut blackness
limited spot colors and carved ink texture
visible halftone dots and ink grain

improvementRules.tooSmooth: Add: rough ink edges, visible print texture, imperfect registration.
improvementRules.tooManyColors: Limit to 2-4 spot colors plus paper and black.
improvementRules.tooDelicate: Use bold carved shapes and high contrast instead of thin outlines.
improvementRules.tooDigital: Add: risograph overprint, halftone grain, handmade poster print.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 標準のリソ/リノカット。少色・版ズレ・インク粒子のバランス型。木版ほど黒い彫り跡に寄せない。

styles.labelJa: 印刷・版画（グラデーション）
styles.referenceGlob: 印刷・版画（リソ／リノカット／木版）グラデーション*

visualFingerprint.line: bold carved marks, ink-like edges, rough printed contours
visualFingerprint.shape: poster-like flat blocks, cutout silhouettes, simplified high-contrast forms
visualFingerprint.color: limited print palette with visible gradient/overprint fields
visualFingerprint.texture: risograph grain, linocut or woodblock texture, ink misregistration; 版画系の中でも、面の中に見えるグラデーション/オーバープリントが主役。硬い木版線より色の重なりを優先。
visualFingerprint.composition: strong graphic layout, print poster energy, deliberate color separation
visualFingerprint.person: reduced to bold readable shapes, expressive silhouette rather than detailed face

promptFragments: visible gradient ink fields are the main signature
soft riso overprint gradients inside print shapes
color transitions within limited spot-color print
printmaking with visible gradient ink fields
visible halftone dots and ink grain

improvementRules.tooSmooth: Add: rough ink edges, visible print texture, imperfect registration.
improvementRules.tooManyColors: Limit to 2-4 spot colors plus paper and black.
improvementRules.tooDelicate: Use bold carved shapes and high contrast instead of thin outlines.
improvementRules.tooDigital: Add: risograph overprint, halftone grain, handmade poster print.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 版画系の中でも、面の中に見えるグラデーション/オーバープリントが主役。硬い木版線より色の重なりを優先。

visualFingerprint.line: bold carved black marks and rough relief-print edges
visualFingerprint.shape: poster-like flat blocks, cutout silhouettes, simplified high-contrast forms
visualFingerprint.color: limited spot-color palette, black plus red/pink/yellow/teal, off-white paper
visualFingerprint.texture: woodcut or linocut ink texture, visible handmade print process; リソ風の版ズレやグラデーションではなく、黒い彫り跡・木版/リノカットの硬い削り跡が主役。
visualFingerprint.composition: strong graphic layout, print poster energy, deliberate color separation
visualFingerprint.person: reduced to bold readable shapes, expressive silhouette rather than detailed face

promptFragments: black carved gouge marks are the dominant feature
hard relief-print cuts rather than riso softness
visible halftone dots and ink grain

improvementRules.tooSmooth: Add: rough ink edges, visible print texture, imperfect registration.
improvementRules.tooManyColors: Limit to 2-4 spot colors plus paper and black.
improvementRules.tooDelicate: Use bold carved shapes and high contrast instead of thin outlines.
improvementRules.tooDigital: Add: risograph overprint, halftone grain, handmade poster print.

styles.styleDifferentiator: リソ風の版ズレやグラデーションではなく、黒い彫り跡・木版/リノカットの硬い削り跡が主役。

styles.labelJa: エディトリアル・アウトラインアート
styles.referenceGlob: エディトリアル・アウトラインアート*

visualFingerprint.line: thin monoline outline, sparse continuous line feeling, restrained black strokes; 一筆のような制約より、完成度のあるアウトラインアート。細線に加えて小さな塗り・装飾・構図の見せ場を持つ。
visualFingerprint.shape: minimal geometric simplification, light symbolic forms, little filled area
visualFingerprint.color: mostly white or very pale background, one small accent color
visualFingerprint.texture: clean digital line art, almost no texture, no heavy grain
visualFingerprint.composition: airy editorial art layout with restrained outline and small accent fills
visualFingerprint.person: gender-neutral simplified figure, minimal face, gesture-led communication

promptFragments: finished editorial outline art, not one-stroke constraint
small refined accent fills and artful details
composed outline artwork with a clear editorial focal point
thin outline with slightly more illustrative art presence
only one or two small accent color fills

improvementRules.tooFilled: Remove filled color blocks; keep mostly thin outlines and one accent.
improvementRules.tooBusy: Increase whitespace; reduce scene to person, cup, walking cue.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain, paper texture, painterly rendering.
improvementRules.tooGeneric: Add: editorial column illustration, refined monoline, sparse visual metaphor.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 一筆のような制約より、完成度のあるアウトラインアート。細線に加えて小さな塗り・装飾・構図の見せ場を持つ。

styles.labelJa: エディトリアル・アウトライン一筆
styles.referenceGlob: エディトリアル・アウトライン一筆*

visualFingerprint.line: one-stroke continuous monoline, sparse and unbroken; 線が途切れず続く一筆感が主役。塗り・装飾・説明的背景を極力削る。
visualFingerprint.shape: minimal gesture-led shapes with almost no filled area
visualFingerprint.color: mostly white or very pale background, one small accent color
visualFingerprint.texture: clean digital line art, almost no texture, no heavy grain
visualFingerprint.composition: large whitespace, airy layout, editorial restraint
visualFingerprint.person: gender-neutral simplified figure, minimal face, gesture-led communication

promptFragments: only one or two small accent color fills
negativeFragments: accent fills as the main feature

improvementRules.tooFilled: Remove filled color blocks; keep mostly thin outlines and one accent.
improvementRules.tooBusy: Increase whitespace; reduce scene to person, cup, walking cue.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain, paper texture, painterly rendering.
improvementRules.tooGeneric: Add: editorial column illustration, refined monoline, sparse visual metaphor.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 線が途切れず続く一筆感が主役。塗り・装飾・説明的背景を極力削る。

styles.labelJa: エディトリアル・アウトライン
styles.referenceGlob: エディトリアル・アウトライン[0-9.]*

visualFingerprint.line: thin monoline outline, sparse continuous line feeling, restrained black strokes; 標準のミニマルアウトライン。必ずしも一筆ではなく、装飾アートでもない。余白と細線の読みやすさ重視。
visualFingerprint.shape: minimal geometric simplification, light symbolic forms, little filled area
visualFingerprint.color: mostly white or very pale background, one small accent color
visualFingerprint.texture: clean digital line art, almost no texture, no heavy grain
visualFingerprint.composition: minimal editorial whitespace with sparse person/cue layout
visualFingerprint.person: gender-neutral simplified figure, minimal face, gesture-led communication

promptFragments: minimal sparse outline, not necessarily one continuous stroke
clear readable monoline with generous whitespace
thin sparse monoline and large whitespace
only one or two small accent color fills
negativeFragments: strict one-stroke gimmick as main feature

improvementRules.tooFilled: Remove filled color blocks; keep mostly thin outlines and one accent.
improvementRules.tooBusy: Increase whitespace; reduce scene to person, cup, walking cue.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain, paper texture, painterly rendering.
improvementRules.tooGeneric: Add: editorial column illustration, refined monoline, sparse visual metaphor.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 標準のミニマルアウトライン。必ずしも一筆ではなく、装飾アートでもない。余白と細線の読みやすさ重視。

styles.labelJa: フラットベクター（コーポレート）
styles.referenceGlob: フラットベクター（コーポレート）[0-9.]*

visualFingerprint.line: clean vector edges, optional thin support lines, crisp geometry
visualFingerprint.shape: geometric simplified forms, modular UI-like composition, high readability; 標準のコーポレートフラット。色数・塗り面・立体のどれかに特化せず、汎用的で整理されたベクター。
visualFingerprint.color: controlled corporate palette with blue, orange, black, pale backgrounds
visualFingerprint.texture: smooth vector surfaces, no grain, no painterly artifacts
visualFingerprint.composition: balanced commercial layout, clear hierarchy, presentation-ready
visualFingerprint.person: simple friendly character, minimal face, business or lifestyle readability

promptFragments: clean vector hierarchy without special two-tone or 3D constraint
controlled blue and orange accent palette
negativeFragments: strict subtype gimmick dominating the image

improvementRules.tooHandmade: Add: crisp vector edges, geometric construction, smooth flat fills.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain and print texture; request clean scalable vector style.
improvementRules.tooPlain: Add a few interface-like or urban walking support shapes while preserving clarity.
improvementRules.tooDecorative: Prioritize business-friendly readability and simple hierarchy.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 標準のコーポレートフラット。色数・塗り面・立体のどれかに特化せず、汎用的で整理されたベクター。

styles.labelJa: フラットベクター（ツートン）
styles.referenceGlob: フラットベクター（コーポレート）ツートン*

visualFingerprint.line: clean vector edges, optional thin support lines, crisp geometry
visualFingerprint.shape: geometric simplified forms, modular UI-like composition, high readability; 色数制限が主役。2色＋白を厳守し、塗り面の量より配色制約で見せる。
visualFingerprint.color: two-tone corporate palette with controlled contrast
visualFingerprint.texture: smooth vector surfaces, no grain, no painterly artifacts
visualFingerprint.composition: balanced commercial layout, clear hierarchy, presentation-ready
visualFingerprint.person: simple friendly character, minimal face, business or lifestyle readability

promptFragments: strict two-tone palette is the main signature
controlled blue and orange accent palette

improvementRules.tooHandmade: Add: crisp vector edges, geometric construction, smooth flat fills.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain and print texture; request clean scalable vector style.
improvementRules.tooPlain: Add a few interface-like or urban walking support shapes while preserving clarity.
improvementRules.tooDecorative: Prioritize business-friendly readability and simple hierarchy.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 色数制限が主役。2色＋白を厳守し、塗り面の量より配色制約で見せる。

styles.labelJa: フラットベクター（塗りつぶし）
styles.referenceGlob: フラットベクター（コーポレート）塗りつぶし*

visualFingerprint.line: clean vector edges, optional thin support lines, crisp geometry
visualFingerprint.shape: large filled modular vector shapes, clean and readable; ベクター派生の中でも大きな塗り面が主役。ツートン縛りでも立体でもなく、均一な面で構成する。
visualFingerprint.color: controlled corporate palette with blue, orange, black, pale backgrounds
visualFingerprint.texture: smooth vector surfaces, no grain, no painterly artifacts
visualFingerprint.composition: balanced commercial layout, clear hierarchy, presentation-ready
visualFingerprint.person: simple friendly character, minimal face, business or lifestyle readability

promptFragments: large filled vector color areas dominate
minimal linework, shapes read through filled areas
controlled blue and orange accent palette
negativeFragments: isometric or dimensional depth as main feature

improvementRules.tooHandmade: Add: crisp vector edges, geometric construction, smooth flat fills.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain and print texture; request clean scalable vector style.
improvementRules.tooPlain: Add a few interface-like or urban walking support shapes while preserving clarity.
improvementRules.tooDecorative: Prioritize business-friendly readability and simple hierarchy.

styles.styleDifferentiator: ベクター派生の中でも大きな塗り面が主役。ツートン縛りでも立体でもなく、均一な面で構成する。

styles.labelJa: フラットベクター（立体）
styles.referenceGlob: フラットベクター（コーポレート）立体*

visualFingerprint.line: clean vector edges, optional thin support lines, crisp geometry
visualFingerprint.shape: clean vector geometry with slight dimensional depth; 平面ベクターに軽い奥行き・立体/アイソメ感を足す分類。塗りつぶしだけではなく面の向きが見える。
visualFingerprint.color: controlled corporate palette with blue, orange, black, pale backgrounds
visualFingerprint.texture: smooth vector surfaces, no grain, no painterly artifacts
visualFingerprint.composition: balanced commercial layout, clear hierarchy, presentation-ready
visualFingerprint.person: simple friendly character, minimal face, business or lifestyle readability

promptFragments: slight dimensional or isometric vector construction
visible planar faces made from flat colors
flat vector with slight dimensional/isometric feel
controlled blue and orange accent palette

improvementRules.tooHandmade: Add: crisp vector edges, geometric construction, smooth flat fills.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain and print texture; request clean scalable vector style.
improvementRules.tooPlain: Add a few interface-like or urban walking support shapes while preserving clarity.
improvementRules.tooDecorative: Prioritize business-friendly readability and simple hierarchy.

styles.styleDifferentiator: 平面ベクターに軽い奥行き・立体/アイソメ感を足す分類。塗りつぶしだけではなく面の向きが見える。

visualFingerprint.line: clean vector edges, optional thin support lines, crisp geometry
visualFingerprint.shape: geometric simplified forms, modular UI-like composition, high readability
visualFingerprint.color: controlled corporate palette with blue, orange, black, pale backgrounds
visualFingerprint.texture: smooth vector surfaces, no grain, no painterly artifacts
visualFingerprint.composition: technology-oriented SaaS illustration with UI-like hierarchy
visualFingerprint.person: optional simplified tech/product character or object

promptFragments: controlled blue and orange accent palette

improvementRules.tooHandmade: Add: crisp vector edges, geometric construction, smooth flat fills.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain and print texture; request clean scalable vector style.
improvementRules.tooPlain: Add a few interface-like or urban walking support shapes while preserving clarity.
improvementRules.tooDecorative: Prioritize business-friendly readability and simple hierarchy.
